nasb.text: “For the kingdom of heaven is like a landowner who went out early in the morning to hire laborers for his vineyard.

esv.text: “For the kingdom of heaven is like a master of a house who went out early in the morning to hire laborers for his vineyard.

cnv.text: “天國好像一個家主，清早出去雇請工人到他的葡萄園工作。

ccb.text: 耶稣接着说：“因为天国就像一个园主清早去外面请工人到他的葡萄园做工。

csbs.text: “天国好比一家的主人，一大早出去雇人到他的葡萄园工作。
